title: API Rate Limits
content:
CloudDesk API enforces rate limits to ensure platform stability.

**Limits by Plan:**
- Starter: 60 requests/minute, 1,000/day
- Pro: 300 requests/minute, 10,000/day
- Enterprise: Custom limits, contact sales

**Headers Returned:**
- X-RateLimit-Limit: your plan's per-minute limit
- X-RateLimit-Remaining: requests left in current window
- X-RateLimit-Reset: Unix timestamp when window resets

**When Exceeded:**
HTTP 429 Too Many Requests is returned. Retry after the time indicated in the Retry-After response header.

**Best Practices:**
- Implement exponential backoff on 429 responses
- Cache responses where possible
- Use webhooks instead of polling for event-driven use cases
